column1: Congratulations, you've broken the bank. This casino has a limit of $250.00 per person, and you've reached it. No more for you, Larry!
column2: Congratulations, you've broken the bank. This casino has a limit of $250.00 per person, and you've reached it. No more for you, Larry!

column1: You know, the traffic here is really a killer! You should forget about crossing these streets!
column2: You know, the traffic here is really a killer! You should forget about crossing these streets!

column1: Vowing to hold your breath forever, you enter this miserable excuse for public transportation.
column2: Vowing to hold your breath forever, you enter this miserable excuse for public transportation.

column1: Look out! Here he comes again!
column2: Look out! Here he comes again!

column1: Obviously, he thinks you're a fire plug.
column2: Obviously, he thinks you're a fire plug.

column1: Dogs like that make you want to keep moving.
column2: Dogs like that make you want to keep moving.

column1: I can't wait all day, bub!
column2: I can't wait all day, bub!

column1: You'll not ride with me again!
column2: You'll not ride with me again!

column1: After all he's done for you?
column2: After all he's done for you?

column1: He presently smells quite bad, although still better than you.
column2: He presently smells quite bad, although still better than you.

column1: You'd better get out of the street first.
column2: You'd better get out of the street first.

column1: Thousands of cars stream past, just below the edge of your screen.
column2: Thousands of cars stream past, just below the edge of your screen.

column1: It smells like an old cab.
column2: It smells like an old cab.

column1: Isn't it funny how there's so little traffic?
column2: Isn't it funny how there's so little traffic?

column1: The glow of the city lights obliterate the stars.
column2: The glow of the city lights obliterate the stars.

column1: As you bend over to do so, his bare teeth convince you otherwise.
column2: As you bend over to do so, his bare teeth convince you otherwise.

column1: You shinny up the pole, read the sign, and come right back down.
column2: You shinny up the pole, read the sign, and come right back down.

column1: There is a sign on the pole.
column2: There is a sign on the pole.
